creator: takefu@airport.fm
text:
Created attachment 189984
nginx-1.12.2_5,2.patch

As for the patch content, `modsecurity-3.0.0.tar.gz' does not exist, so change to go take `modsecurity-2.9.2.tar.gz'.


# make __MAKE_CONF=/dev/null BATCH=1 DEFAULT_VERSIONS+=ssl=libressl PORT_OPTIONS="HTTP MODSECURITY"
